# GitHub Repository Topics

Add these topics to the repository on GitHub for maximum discoverability:

## Primary Topics (Add these first)
- `llm`
- `distributed-inference`
- `apple-silicon`
- `macos`
- `swiftui`
- `local-ai`
- `llama`
- `ai-cluster`

## Secondary Topics
- `distributed-computing`
- `machine-learning`
- `privacy`
- `offline-ai`
- `homelab`
- `m1`
- `m2`
- `m3`
- `m4`
- `exo`
- `mistral`
- `qwen`
- `peer-to-peer`
- `menu-bar-app`
- `zero-config`

## How to Add Topics
1. Go to https://github.com/PlatiniumTermite/MacHive
2. Click "About" (gear icon on the right sidebar)
3. Add topics from the list above
4. Click "Save changes"

## Why These Topics Matter
- `llm` - 50k+ searches/month on GitHub
- `distributed-inference` - Niche but high-intent
- `apple-silicon` - Growing community
- `local-ai` - Privacy-focused users
- `swiftui` - macOS developers
